default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content performance, tour updates, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Overall clicks dropped \~3%, but Puerto Vallarta saw record clicks and steady growth](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Cabo Adventures launched new Beach Club and Adventure Park experiences, requiring content updates](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [New blog category structure is ready for implementation, will require re-categorizing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Overall clicks dropped \~3% across Cabo, Vallarta, and Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Puerto Vallarta: Record clicks, steady growth](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [Top performers: "Things to do in October" (3% CTR), Malecón article](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
